description: CompositionMaroon polo neck t-shirt made of CVC, has a yellow ridged collar with maroon stripes along the hem, logo printed buttons and an embroidered logo on left chestFittingSlimWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoMade of durable CVC material with a mat finish, this t-shirt from adidas is sure to stay you friend for years to come. More durable than cotton fabric, this CVC T-shirt keeps you free from sweat, allowing your skin to breathe freely. Wear this for a royal golf session or simply pair it with jeans and sneakers for a casual occasion.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
